message:
fix(h1): correct Send bounds on async read/write trait constraints

Swapped misplaced Send bounds between read_with_timeout and serve_stream
methods to ensure correct trait requirements:

- read_with_timeout: removed Send bound (internal method, doesn't need it)
- serve_stream: added Send bound (public method, futures may be spawned)

This fixes compilation when using the HTTP/1.1 server with certain async
runtimes that require Send bounds on spawned futures while avoiding
unnecessarily restrictive bounds on internal helper methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
